theme: Shortest word that collapses every DFA state
title: Collapse the Automaton: Synchronizing a Hidden Cerny Machine
strategies: trivial rotate-and-contract: recover the cycle+contraction but walk several extra full turns between contractions (valid, long) -> reproduces the checker baseline

greedy pairwise merge (Eppstein): precompute shortest merging words for all pairs by one backward BFS from the diagonal, repeatedly merge the closest active pair; blind to the global algebra, lands well above optimum
subset BFS over the 2^n powerset: exact but explodes for these sizes

strong / insight: read the planted permutation+contraction algebra -- identify the n-cycle R and the single contraction C (x -> its R-successor y), then emit the Cerny word C (R^{n-1} C)^{n-2} of near-quadratic length (n-1)^2
